Starbites Switch 2 Version Delayed

The NIS America and Ikinagames RPG Starbites is delayed on the Switch 2, but all other versions will appear as planned.

text:
Time Crisis PS4 and PS5 Version Gets Gyro Aim

The PS1 Time Crisis game is headed to the PS4 and PS5 via the PlayStation Plus Classic program and now has a Gyro Aim feature.

The post Time Crisis PS4 and PS5 Version Gets Gyro Aim appeared first on Siliconera.

New Pokemon Keychains Are Replicas of Plamo Model Kits

The next Pokemon keychains are replicas of the Plamo Quick model kits of Kanto starters, Eevee, Pikachu, and Mew.

The post New Pokemon Keychains Are Replicas of Plamo Model Kits appeared first on Siliconera.
